title: tigridia mexicana
intro: Tigridia mexicana, also known as the Mexican shellflower or Tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Tigridia mexicana include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being.
